title: Day 49 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - ゼミの　せんぱいと　のみに　いくんだけど、　いっしょに　いかない？ = I'm going to have drinks with a senior from the seminar. Do you want to go together?

Sentence 2 - あしたは　ともだちと　やくそく　あるんだ。= I have an appointment with a friend tomorrow.

Sentence 3 - なに　するの？ = What are you doing?

Sentence 4 - チケット　あたったの？ = Did you win tickets?

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
